title: crassula obovata var. dregeana
intro: Crassula obovata var. dregeana, also known as the Mountain Crassula or Drege's Crassula, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas or infusions, or used in topical applications such as ointments or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
